verses.text: Pasian aw, ka lungsim a kigingsa-in om hi. Ka sa ding hi; nangmah phatna late ka sa ding hi. Kei ka khanglo ding hi
Harp lasakna leh laia lasakna aw, khanglo un. Zingsang khuavak hong phong ning
Topa aw, mite lakah nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko ding a, minam dangte lakah nangma tungah phatna ka sa ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh na itna kip in vantung ban a, na thumanna in meiipite banto hi
Pasian aw, vantungte' tungah sangto lai in. Leitung khempeuhah na minthan'na omsak in
Nangma it mite, na hatna tawh hon in la, kong ngetna bangun hong pia in
Ama biakinn sungah Pasian in thu ciam khin a, “Gualzo-a lungdamna tawh Shekhem gam khenkhia-in, Sukkoth gam kuam ka sehkhia ding hi
Gilead gam keima-a' hi a, Manasseh gam zong keima-a' mah ahi hi. Efraim gam ka siklukhu hi a, Judah gam ka ciangkhut ahi hi
Moab gam ka kisilna kuang hi a, keima neihsa hi, cih lahna limin Edom gam tungah ka khedap ka lawn hi. Filistia gam tungah gualzawhna tawh ka awng hi,” a ci hi
Kua in khuapi muan'huai-ah kei hong paipih ding hiam? Kua in Edom gamah kei hong paipih ding hiam
Pasian aw, nangmah in kote hong donlo khinta hilo na hi hiam? Pasian aw, komau galkapte tawh na kuankhia kei hi
Ka galdona uhah kote hong huh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihing' huhna a mawkna hi
Pasian tawh khauhtakin i hih ding hi. Amah pen i galte hong sikcipsak dingpa ahi hi.
